overall.description: First-person driving gameplay through a rainy cyberpunk city at night. The player navigates a vehicle through neon-lit commercial districts, elevated highways, and covered tunnels before stopping at a busy intersection. The footage features heavy rain, reflective wet streets, and dense urban architecture typical of the Cyberpunk 2077 game engine.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a right turn at a wet intersection in a dense commercial district. A black SUV passes on the left as the vehicle navigates the turn. The orange structural arch dominates the forward view while pedestrians walk along the elevated plaza to the left. Neon-lit glass buildings line the right side of the street.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions onto an elevated highway section, leaving the ground-level commercial area behind. Concrete barriers line the right side while massive support pillars pass by on the left. The space is semi-covered by overhead structures, providing partial shelter from the rain. Sparse traffic moves along the wet elevated roadway.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a fully enclosed tunnel section, transitioning from natural ambient light to artificial overhead lighting. The concrete walls create a narrow enclosed space with graffiti visible on the surfaces. The tunnel exit is visible ahead as a bright point of light at the far end of the structure.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a neon-lit commercial street. The vehicle follows a distinctive red vintage sedan toward a busy intersection. Bright neon signs illuminate the storefronts on both sides. The vehicle comes to a stop behind the red car at a traffic light, with the crosswalk visible ahead.

segments.scene_description: Stopped at the intersection, the camera pans right to reveal the crosswalk and waiting pedestrians on the sidewalk. The red vintage sedan remains stopped ahead. Cross traffic moves through the intersection while the vehicle waits at the red light. Neon-lit storefronts line the corners of the wide intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city, transitioning from a dense commercial district into a confined industrial tunnel. It begins with a right turn at a wet intersection, passing a black SUV and moving beneath a massive orange structural arch while neon-lit glass buildings and pedestrians line the route. As the vehicle leaves the ground-level plaza, the scene shifts onto an elevated highway where concrete barriers and massive support pillars frame a semi-covered roadway. The environment then tightens as the camera enters a fully enclosed tunnel, replacing the ambient city glow with artificial overhead lighting and graffiti-covered concrete walls. This narrow passage continues forward before finally centering on a bright point of light marking the tunnel's exit.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed darkness of a tunnel into the vibrant, rain-slicked expanse of a neon-lit commercial district. It begins as the vehicle emerges into the open air, trailing a distinctive red vintage sedan through a corridor of glowing storefronts and bright signage. As the vehicle approaches a busy intersection, the motion slows and eventually comes to a complete stop behind the red car at a traffic light. The scene then shifts as the camera pans right, expanding the view to reveal waiting pedestrians on the sidewalk and cross traffic flowing through the wide, illuminated junction.
